mapper.select: SELECT message_id, message_key, message_value, locale, message_type, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM message_table ORDER BY message_key, locale, message_type

SELECT message_id, message_key, message_value, locale, message_type, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM message_table WHERE message_key = #{messageKey} ORDER BY locale, message_type, message_id LIMIT 1

SELECT message_id, message_key, message_value, locale, message_type, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM message_table WHERE message_key = #{messageKey} AND locale = #{locale} ORDER BY message_type, message_id LIMIT 1

SELECT message_id, message_key, message_value, locale, message_type, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM message_table WHERE message_key = #{messageKey} AND locale = #{locale} AND message_type = #{messageType} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY message_id LIMIT 1
SELECT message_id, message_key, message_value, locale, message_type, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM message_table WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_table ( message_key, message_value, locale, message_type, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{messageKey}, #{messageValue}, #{locale}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{messageType}, ''), 'EXTERNAL'), #{description}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW(), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE message_table SET message_key = #{request.messageKey}, message_value = #{request.messageValue}, locale = #{request.locale}, message_type = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.messageType}, ''), 'EXTERNAL'), description = #{request.description}, use_yn = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.useYn}, ''), 'Y'), updated_by = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
